PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 18, 2018, is admitted to probate. Jonathan Levin, Jeremy Levin, and Elise Patler are appointed Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
